case_title: MICHAEL NAZLUKHANYAN VS. PACIFIC COAST CONTAINER, INC et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAZLUKHANYAN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST CONTAINER, INC $3,684.80 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,754.80, DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST CONTAINER, INC.
